title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind introduced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model enabling creation of tracks up to 3 minutes long with customization and creative control. The model is being integrated into more Google products following the launch of Lyria 3 last month.
